initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must either accept or reject the proposal. Since the trade only benefits Player RED, I will reject it to avoid losing everything. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I cannot accept this trade as it gives me nothing. I will reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order, and the content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources to trade, the only options are to accept or reject. Rejecting the unfair proposal prevents losing everything, which aligns with the goal of preserving resources.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources, so the trade is inherently one-sided. Rejecting is the only logical move to avoid losing everything, so it is plausible.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> is consistent with the <player answer> (REJECT) and the <newly proposed trade> (NONE). The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move respects the turn constraints and the rules, as Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and has correctly chosen to reject the proposal.
</critique>
